features.title: LocalStack DynamoDB CMS harness
features.description: Provide a local LocalStack DynamoDB setup that mimics the CMS data layer for the webapp and is usable by future coding agents.

evidence: npm run build in aws: passed
pnpm lint in sunswift-website-v3: passed with one existing unused Geist warning
./init.sh rerun on 2026-05-15: blocked at Docker daemon health check
./init.sh on 2026-05-15: passed after pinning LocalStack to 4.10.0 and adding idempotent S3 bootstrap

notes: LocalStack now starts with DynamoDB and S3 for the CMS harness.

features.title: Sunswift redesign foundation and Webflow text import
features.description: First redesign slice with public route shells, Opal-inspired homepage, Webflow text import, CMS v1 for team members and roles, S3 headshot staging, and Auth.js Google admin login.

evidence: ./init.sh: passed with LocalStack DynamoDB and S3
npm run build in aws: passed
Vehicles route contained Garage archive, Sunswift 7, and Related posts text
Admin login route contained Sunswift CMS, Admin login, and Continue with Google text
Follow-up visual verification enabled with local agent-browser script on 2026-05-15

notes: Webflow text is imported into repo-managed JSON via pnpm import:webflow.
CMS v1 is limited to team members, headshots, and recruitment roles.
Auth.js is configured for Google OAuth and authorized email gating.

features.title: Opal-inspired light homepage, browser verification, and README
features.description: Update the Sunswift homepage toward the Opal Tadpole reference with a light image-led hero, Roobert-like typography, Tomorrow Today slogan, documented human workflows, and repeatable agent-browser verification.

evidence: ./init.sh: passed with LocalStack DynamoDB and S3, AWS build/test, frontend typecheck/lint
pnpm verify:browser: passed after installing Chrome for agent-browser; desktop 1440x1000 and mobile 390x844 checked for content, dev overlays, screenshots, and horizontal overflow
HTTP smoke while dev server was running: /, /vehicles, and /admin/login returned 200

notes: agent-browser is now a local dev dependency with pnpm verify:browser.
Root README and app README document local running, testing, browser verification, and deploy testing.
